objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
archetype: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- bollinger(period=46, std_dev=2.4)
- rsi(period=21)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 25
- short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 80
exit:
- condition: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.25
tp_atr_mult: 5.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.25x) and take-profit (5.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger Bands with RSI and ATR to identify mean reversion opportunities in a trending market, while also using ATR risk management for stop-loss and take profit. Also considering the RSI oversold/overbought levels as potential trend reversal points.
Combining Bollinger Band, RSI and ATR to identify mean reversion in the market trend.
